description: Ownership note on a folio that came from a volume containing texts by Yehuda Ḥayyūj; Ibn Gikatilla (d. after 1305); and Kitāb al-Tajnīs by Yehuda ibn Balʿam; and perhaps other works. The teacher Ḥasdeʾel b. Moshe purchased the book, and Shemuel b. Yosef ha-Levi wrote the note.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
